

::::{.ddm}
:::{.dd-head onclick="toggleBox(this)"}

About us
:::
:::{.dd-box}

::::{.columns}
:::{.column}
We’re a team from GIK Institute who’ve spent years working with financial data. Like most analysts, we were tired of wasting time cleaning data instead of analyzing it—so we created `dalmash` to make investing faster, clearer, and more intuitive.
:::
:::{.column}
![GIK Insitute.](figs/dalmash/giki.jpg)
:::
:::: 



:::
::::
